===================
===================
=== bd1990-09-02_hannibal.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 9/2/90, Hannibal, 2CDR

very good to excellent sound. The only down-point is some audience-members screaming and chatting through the first songs, the reason is probably that the first four songs were played via the musicians monitors only. The sound man was arrested before the show for "unnecessary noise" during the support act! 

CD1 
1 Absolutely Sweet Marie 2 Tomorrow Is A Long Time 3 I Want You 4 Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again 5 Masters Of War 6 Man Of Peace 7 Man Of Constant Sorrow (acoustic w band) 8 Trail Of The Buffalo (acoustic w band) 9 Mama, You Been On My Mind (acoustic w band) 

CD2 
1 Boots Of Spanish Leather (acoustic w band) 2 Pledging My Time 3 Man In The Long Black Coat 4 Silvio 5 In The Garden 6 I Shall Be Released 7 Like A Rolling Stone 8 The Times They Are A-Changin' (acoustic w band) 9 Highway 61 Revisited
===================
===================
===================
